PR type: research

<!-- Use `PR type: research` for mathematical/research-state changes.
Use `PR type: technical` for docs, tooling, templates, catalog imports, or CI.
Maintainer override is label-only: `maintainer-override` or `pr-guard: override`. -->

## Contribution Type

- [ ] Problem workspace
- [ ] Claim
- [ ] Route
- [ ] Attempt
- [ ] Failure or refutation
- [ ] Source/reference
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Technical/infrastructure

## What Changed

For research PRs, state the problem ID and summarize the checkable research
object or objects added. Keep the PR scoped to one problem.

## Verification

- [ ] Sources are precise, or derivation is reproducible.
- [ ] Dependencies are listed.
- [ ] Gap or weakness is explicit.
- [ ] AI assistance is disclosed.
- [ ] No raw transcript is included.
- [ ] Text follows `docs/text-policy.md`.

## Review Requested

- [ ] LLM triage
- [ ] Human mathematical review
- [ ] Formal verification
